title: PKU Commons living food-list row
description: One food-list entry. Every row is a Layer-1 (legal-style review) artifact: it MUST carry a citation to authority, a version, and a reviewer of record. See docs/PEER-REVIEW.md.

key.description: stable lowercase lookup key, e.g. 'banana raw'

description.description: human-readable food name (verbatim from the cited source where possible)

phe_mg_per_100g.description: phenylalanine, mg per 100 g edible portion

protein_g_per_100g.description: protein, g per 100 g (for phe:protein ratio derivation)

citation.description: Layer-1 requirement: authority this row answers to. Exactly one authority kind.

authority.description: which citable authority backs this row

off_code.description: Open Food Facts product barcode (when authority=OpenFoodFacts)

version.description: row version so history is reconstructable, e.g. 'v0'

reviewer_of_record.description: who accepted this row and can be asked about it

accepted_utc.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the row was accepted
